body:
## Summary
Adds the `--use-agent-commander` option to both `solve.mjs` and `hive.mjs`. When enabled, this experimental flag delegates tool execution to the [agent-commander](https://github.com/link-assistant/agent-commander) library instead of using the embedded tool logic in this repository.

Fixes #1043

## Changes
- Added `--use-agent-commander` option to `solve.config.lib.mjs` (hidden, experimental)
- Added `--use-agent-commander` option to `hive.config.lib.mjs` (hidden, experimental)
- Created `agent-commander.lib.mjs` wrapper library with:
  - `isAgentCommanderAvailable()` - Checks if agent-commander is installed
  - `validateAgentCommanderConnection()` - Validates tool connection
  - `executeWithAgentCommander()` - Unified execution interface
  - `checkForUncommittedChanges()` - Git status checking
- Integrated agent-commander in `solve.mjs` tool execution flow (first priority check when flag enabled)
- Passed `--use-agent-commander` flag through `hive.mjs` to solve workers
- Added `agent-commander` as optional dependency in `package.json`
- Added experiment scripts for testing the integration

## Behavior
The option is:
- Hidden from `--help` output (experimental feature)
- Disabled by default (opt-in only)
- Fails gracefully with clear error message when agent-commander is not installed

## Usage
```bash
# Install agent-commander (required for the flag to work)
npm install agent-commander

# Use with solve.mjs
solve.mjs https://github.com/owner/repo/issues/123 --use-agent-commander

# Use with hive.mjs
hive.mjs https://github.com/owner/repo --use-agent-commander
```

## Test plan
- [x] Verify `--use-agent-commander` option is hidden from `--help`
- [x] Verify lint and format checks pass
- [x] Verify baseline functionality works without the flag
- [x] Verify availability detection works (shows clear message when not installed)
- [x] Verify graceful failure when agent-commander is not installed

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
